data.name: Character Expression Sheet
data.author: Fyrean
data.tags: Character Design, Expression Sheet, Reference, Multi-Modal
data.description: Generate character expression reference sheets showing multiple facial expressions in a grid layout. Creates consistent character portraits with varying emotions while maintaining identical features, perfect for animation, game design, and character development.
data.promptTemplate: Create a character expression reference sheet showing multiple facial expressions in a grid layout. Base the character on the input image. Display 4 different expressions as shoulder-up portraits arranged in rows. Include these expressions: {{expression_set}}. Each portrait should show the same character with identical facial features, hairstyle, hair color, eye color, and outfit visible from shoulders up. Maintain character design consistency across all expressions while varying only the facial expression, eye shape, eyebrow position, and mouth. Professional character expression sheet layout with equal spacing between portraits. {{background_color}} background. {{char_desc}}

textFields.label: Base Instruction (Do Not Modify Unless Needed)
textFields.defaultValue: Create a professional character reference sheet showing three complete views displayed side by side: front view facing camera (left position), side profile view facing right (middle position), and back view facing away (right position). All three views must depict the exact same character based on the input image. Maintain absolute consistency across all views: identical facial features and structure, same hairstyle with same hair color and length, same complete outfit with all clothing details matching exactly, same accessories in corresponding positions, same footwear, identical body proportions and height, same skin tone, same color palette throughout. Each view must be fully rendered with equal level of detail and quality. All three figures should be the same size and aligned at the same ground level. Character should fill the frame appropriately with head near top and feet near bottom
textFields.helpText: Core instruction for generating the three-view reference sheet. Modify only if you need specific adjustments to the character or want to add unique details.

textFields.label: Additional Character Details (Optional)
textFields.helpText: Add specific character details or modifications you want to see in all three views. Example: 'Add cat ears and tail', 'Include a sword on the character's belt', 'Show wizard robe with star patterns'

data.name: Time of Day Change
data.author: Fyrean
data.tags: Image Editing, Qwen, Time Change, Lighting, Atmosphere
data.description: Change the time of day in images by adjusting lighting, sky, and atmospheric conditions. Preserves composition and subjects while transforming the temporal atmosphere.

options.valueText: Change the time to early dawn before sunrise. Transform the sky to deep blue with hints of purple and pink on the horizon. Apply cool, dim ambient lighting with long soft shadows. Create a serene, quiet atmosphere with low light levels and subtle color gradients in the sky

Change the time to sunrise during golden hour. Transform the sky to warm oranges, pinks, and golds with dramatic clouds. Apply warm, soft directional lighting from low angle. Create long golden shadows and a warm amber glow on all surfaces. Atmosphere should feel fresh and hopeful

Change the time to mid-morning around 9-10 AM. Transform the sky to clear bright blue with scattered white clouds. Apply bright, crisp natural lighting with moderate shadows. Create a fresh, energetic atmosphere with clear visibility and vibrant colors

Change the time to noon with overhead sun. Transform the sky to pale blue or white-blue with minimal clouds. Apply harsh, bright overhead lighting with short, strong shadows directly beneath objects. Create a bright, intense atmosphere with high contrast and saturated colors

Change the time to afternoon around 2-4 PM. Transform the sky to clear blue with occasional clouds. Apply warm, bright natural lighting from a moderate angle. Create medium-length shadows and a comfortable, pleasant atmosphere with good visibility

Change the time to late afternoon around 5 PM. Transform the sky to softer blue with warmer tones beginning. Apply warm, softening light with lengthening shadows. Create a relaxed atmosphere with colors beginning to take on golden hues

Change the time to sunset during golden hour. Transform the sky to dramatic oranges, reds, purples, and golds with spectacular cloud formations. Apply warm, glowing directional lighting from low angle. Create long dramatic shadows and a golden-orange glow on all surfaces. Atmosphere should feel romantic and dramatic

Change the time to dusk after sunset. Transform the sky to deep blue and purple gradients with fading light on the horizon. Apply cool, dim ambient lighting with soft, diffused shadows. Create a tranquil, mysterious atmosphere with reduced contrast and cooler tones

Change the time to early night around 8-9 PM. Transform the sky to dark blue-black with visible stars or moon. Apply cool, low ambient lighting with artificial light sources becoming prominent. Create long soft shadows and a calm nocturnal atmosphere

Change the time to midnight with full darkness. Transform the sky to deep black or dark navy with stars and moon. Apply minimal cool lighting with strong contrast between light sources and shadows. Create a dramatic, mysterious atmosphere with artificial lights being the primary illumination

Change the time to daytime with overcast conditions. Transform the sky to uniform grey clouds covering the entire sky. Apply soft, diffused lighting with no harsh shadows. Create a flat, even illumination with muted colors and a contemplative, subdued atmosphere

Change the time to a stormy period with dark dramatic clouds. Transform the sky to dark grey and black storm clouds with possible breaks of light. Apply dim, dramatic lighting with high contrast. Create a moody, tense atmosphere with desaturated colors and ominous shadows

. Keep all subjects, objects, people, architecture, composition, camera angle, and spatial relationships exactly the same. Only modify lighting, sky, shadows, and atmospheric conditions to reflect the new time of day
. Keep all people, main subjects, and composition exactly the same. Allow natural color shifts and atmospheric changes on surfaces while maintaining identity and positioning
. Keep the main subjects and key objects recognizable. Allow environmental details to adapt naturally to the new lighting conditions
. Maintain the general scene and subjects but allow natural environmental changes that would occur at the new time of day
. Apply photorealistic lighting physics with accurate shadow direction, color temperature, and atmospheric perspective. Ensure natural color grading that matches the time of day
. Apply cinematic lighting with enhanced drama and color saturation. Emphasize the mood with artistic color grading and atmospheric effects like lens flares or volumetric light rays
. Apply gentle, subtle changes to lighting and atmosphere. Make the time shift feel natural and understated with soft color transitions
. Apply bold, striking lighting changes with high contrast and vivid colors. Emphasize the transformation with dramatic shadows and atmospheric effects
. Match the original image's artistic style and photographic quality while adjusting only the temporal lighting conditions

textFields.label: Additional Instructions
textFields.helpText: Optional: Add specific details about how the time change should be applied. Examples: 'Add warm glow from windows', 'Include street lights turning on', 'Show natural transition on skin tones', 'Emphasize the moon in the sky'

data.name: Weather Change
data.author: Fyrean
data.tags: Image Editing, Qwen, Weather Change, Atmosphere, Conditions
data.description: Change the weather conditions in images by adjusting atmospheric effects, precipitation, cloud cover, and environmental conditions. Preserves composition and subjects while transforming the meteorological atmosphere.

options.valueText: Change the weather to clear sunny conditions. Transform the sky to bright blue with no clouds or minimal wispy cirrus clouds. Apply bright, direct sunlight with strong shadows and high contrast. Create crisp visibility with vibrant saturated colors and a cheerful atmosphere

Change the weather to partly cloudy conditions. Transform the sky to blue with scattered white puffy cumulus clouds covering 30-50% of the sky. Apply mixed lighting with alternating sun and cloud shadows. Create dynamic contrast with occasional bright spots and shaded areas

Change the weather to overcast conditions. Transform the sky to uniform grey cloud cover blocking direct sunlight. Apply soft, diffused lighting with no harsh shadows. Create flat, even illumination with muted colors and reduced contrast

Change the weather to light rain conditions. Add visible rain streaks falling throughout the scene, wet surfaces with reflections and puddles forming. Transform the sky to grey clouds with misty atmosphere. Apply soft diffused lighting with moisture in the air creating slight haze. Surfaces should appear damp and glossy

Change the weather to heavy rain conditions. Add dense rain streaks and downpour throughout the scene, large puddles and water accumulation, wet reflective surfaces everywhere. Transform the sky to dark grey storm clouds. Apply dim lighting with reduced visibility through the rain. Create a dramatic stormy atmosphere with water spray and mist

Change the weather to thunderstorm conditions. Add heavy rain with wind-blown streaks, dark ominous clouds with possible lightning illumination effects. Apply dramatic high-contrast lighting with areas of deep shadow. Create intense atmosphere with turbulent sky, wind effects on vegetation and objects, wet surfaces with violent rain impact

Change the weather to light snow conditions. Add gentle snowflakes falling throughout the scene, light snow accumulation on surfaces (roofs, ground, objects). Transform the sky to pale grey-white overcast. Apply cool, soft lighting with diffused shadows. Create a peaceful winter atmosphere with fresh snow coverage

Change the weather to heavy snow conditions. Add dense snowfall with large visible snowflakes, significant snow accumulation covering most surfaces, snow drifts forming. Transform the sky to thick grey-white clouds with reduced visibility. Apply very soft, cool lighting with minimal shadows. Create a blizzard-like atmosphere with snow in the air reducing contrast

Change the weather to foggy conditions. Add dense fog or mist reducing visibility, objects fading into white-grey haze with distance. Apply atmospheric perspective with nearby objects clear and distant ones obscured. Create soft, diffused lighting with no distinct shadows. Atmosphere should feel mysterious and ethereal with low contrast

Change the weather to windy conditions. Add motion blur to vegetation, leaves, loose objects, and clothing showing wind direction. Include wind-blown clouds moving across the sky, possible dust or debris in the air. Apply dynamic lighting with fast-moving cloud shadows. Create energetic atmosphere with visible wind effects throughout the scene

Change the weather to hazy humid conditions. Add atmospheric haze reducing clarity and contrast, moisture in the air creating soft diffusion. Transform the sky to washed-out pale colors with sun barely visible through haze. Apply soft, filtered lighting with gentle shadows. Create a heavy, oppressive atmosphere with reduced color saturation

Change the weather to dusty or light sandstorm conditions. Add visible dust particles in the air, golden-brown atmospheric haze reducing visibility. Transform the sky to amber or orange-brown tones. Apply filtered warm lighting with obscured sun. Create a dry, harsh atmosphere with sand or dust accumulation on surfaces

Change the weather to autumn windy conditions. Add falling colorful leaves (red, orange, yellow, brown) blown by wind, leaves scattered on ground and in mid-air. Transform the sky to crisp blue or partly cloudy autumn sky. Apply cool, clear lighting typical of fall. Create a seasonal atmosphere with autumn colors and wind motion

Change the weather to spring breezy conditions. Add flower petals or blossoms gently falling and floating through the air, fresh green foliage. Transform the sky to clear blue with scattered white clouds. Apply bright, fresh lighting with moderate shadows. Create a renewal atmosphere with soft breeze effects and blooming vegetation

. Keep all subjects, objects, people, architecture, composition, camera angle, and spatial relationships exactly the same. Only modify atmospheric conditions, precipitation, sky, lighting, and weather-related surface effects
. Keep all people, main subjects, and composition exactly the same. Allow natural environmental changes like wet surfaces, snow coverage, or weather effects while maintaining identity and positioning
. Keep the main subjects and key objects recognizable. Allow environmental details and surfaces to adapt naturally to the new weather conditions

. Maintain the general scene and subjects but allow realistic environmental changes that would naturally occur with the weather change (wet surfaces in rain, snow accumulation, wind effects on loose objects)
. Apply gentle weather effects with minimal impact on visibility and lighting. Keep the transformation understated and natural
. Apply clear weather effects that are obvious but not overwhelming. Balance dramatic impact with realism and natural appearance
. Apply intense weather effects with significant impact on lighting, visibility, and atmosphere. Create bold, striking conditions with high contrast and dramatic elements
. Apply maximum weather intensity with severe conditions, reduced visibility, dramatic lighting changes, and powerful atmospheric effects. Create impactful, memorable weather drama
. Apply weather effects with accurate real-world physics including proper water behavior, snow accumulation patterns, atmospheric perspective, and realistic lighting interactions
. Apply artistic weather effects with enhanced drama, color grading, and atmospheric mood. Emphasize visual impact over strict realism with cinematic lighting and enhanced particle effects

textFields.label: Additional Instructions
textFields.helpText: Optional: Add specific details about weather effects. Examples: 'Add rainbow after rain', 'Show frost on windows', 'Include lightning in the distance', 'Make ground muddy', 'Add mist rising from wet pavement'

data.description: Change character outfits while preserving identity, pose, and background. Transform clothing styles from casual to formal, seasonal variations, and specific aesthetics.

options.valueText: Change the outfit to casual everyday wear. Apply comfortable clothing like jeans or casual pants with a t-shirt, hoodie, or casual button-up. Include sneakers or casual shoes. Style should be relaxed, practical, and suitable for daily activities with modern casual aesthetics

Change the outfit to smart casual attire. Apply well-fitted chinos or dark jeans with a collared shirt or polo, optional blazer or cardigan. Include loafers or clean sneakers. Style should be polished yet comfortable, suitable for casual offices or social gatherings

Change the outfit to business professional attire. Apply a tailored suit with dress shirt and tie, or professional dress/skirt suit. Include formal dress shoes. Style should be crisp, authoritative, and suitable for corporate environments with classic professional aesthetics

Change the outfit to business casual attire. Apply dress pants or skirt with a blouse or button-down shirt, optional blazer. Include professional but comfortable shoes. Style should be office-appropriate but less formal, suitable for modern workplaces

Change the outfit to date night or evening out attire. Apply elegant yet stylish clothing like a fitted dress, or dress shirt with tailored pants. Include stylish heels or dress shoes. Style should be attractive, sophisticated, and suitable for restaurants or evening venues with romantic or upscale aesthetics

Change the outfit to formal black tie attire. Apply an elegant evening gown or tuxedo with bow tie. Include formal accessories and elegant shoes. Style should be luxurious, sophisticated, and suitable for galas, weddings, or formal events with high-end elegant aesthetics

Change the outfit to athleisure or sportswear. Apply athletic clothing like leggings or joggers with a sports top, hoodie, or track jacket. Include athletic sneakers. Style should be sporty, comfortable, and suitable for gym, yoga, or active lifestyle with modern athletic aesthetics

Change the outfit to street style urban fashion. Apply trendy pieces like oversized hoodies, graphic tees, cargo pants, or distressed jeans with statement sneakers. Include accessories like caps or chains. Style should be edgy, contemporary, and reflect current urban fashion trends

Change the outfit to preppy or collegiate style. Apply classic pieces like polo shirts, sweaters, blazers, pleated skirts, or chinos. Include loafers or boat shoes. Style should be clean-cut, traditional, and reflect Ivy League or country club aesthetics

Change the outfit to bohemian or boho chic style. Apply flowing fabrics like maxi dresses, loose blouses, wide-leg pants, or layered pieces with ethnic patterns. Include sandals or boots. Style should be free-spirited, artistic, and feature natural fabrics with eclectic accessories

Change the outfit to gothic or alternative fashion. Apply dark clothing like black dresses, leather jackets, band tees, ripped jeans, or Victorian-inspired pieces. Include boots or platform shoes. Style should be dark, dramatic, and reflect gothic or alternative subculture aesthetics

Change the outfit to vintage or retro style. Apply period-appropriate clothing from a specific era like 1950s swing dresses, 1970s flared pants, or 1980s bold blazers. Style should authentically reflect the chosen decade with appropriate cuts, patterns, and accessories

Change the outfit to school uniform style. Apply traditional school attire like blazer with shirt and tie, pleated skirt or dress pants, and dress shoes. Style should be neat, formal, and reflect typical private or public school uniform aesthetics with proper fit

Change the outfit to summer or beach wear. Apply light, breathable clothing like sundresses, shorts with tank tops, or linen shirts with swim-appropriate pieces. Include sandals or flip-flops. Style should be airy, colorful, and suitable for warm weather or beach settings

Change the outfit to winter or cozy wear. Apply warm layered clothing like thick sweaters, coats, scarves, jeans or pants, and boots. Style should be warm, comfortable, and suitable for cold weather with textured fabrics like wool, fleece, or knitwear

Change the outfit to cocktail party attire. Apply semi-formal clothing like a cocktail dress or suit without tie. Include elegant heels or dress shoes. Style should be stylish, sophisticated, and suitable for evening social events with refined aesthetics

Change the outfit to festival or concert wear. Apply expressive, comfortable clothing like crop tops, denim shorts, band tees, or flowy pieces with statement accessories. Include boots or comfortable sneakers. Style should be bold, fun, and suitable for outdoor music events

Change the outfit to minimalist or monochrome style. Apply clean, simple pieces in neutral colors or single color palette like black, white, grey, or beige. Style should be sleek, understated, and focus on quality fabrics and perfect fit with minimal accessories

Change the outfit to streetwear hypebeast style. Apply branded designer streetwear pieces like limited-edition sneakers, graphic hoodies, statement jackets, and designer accessories. Style should be trendy, logo-prominent, and reflect contemporary sneaker and streetwear culture

Change the outfit to traditional or cultural attire. Apply culturally significant clothing like kimono, hanbok, sari, or other traditional garments with appropriate styling. Style should be respectful, authentic, and reflect the specific cultural heritage with traditional patterns and accessories

. Keep all facial features, hairstyle, body proportions, pose, background, and lighting exactly the same. Only change the clothing and footwear while maintaining the person's complete identity and scene composition
. Keep facial features, body proportions, and pose the same. Allow background and lighting to adapt slightly to complement the new outfit style if needed
. Keep facial features and general pose recognizable. Allow body proportions and environmental elements to adjust naturally with the outfit change
. Maintain the general character identity but allow natural adjustments to pose, styling, and environment that suit the new outfit aesthetic

. Apply clothing with perfect fit tailored to the body shape. Include crisp, clean fabric textures with sharp details, proper wrinkles and folds, and well-defined accessories. High attention to fashion detail
. Apply clothing with comfortable, slightly loose fit. Include natural fabric draping, casual styling, and minimal accessories. Focus on wearable, lived-in appearance
. Apply clothing with modern, trendy cuts and styling. Include contemporary fashion details, bold accessories, and current season aesthetics. High fashion sensibility with statement pieces
. Apply clothing with traditional, enduring cuts and styling. Include quality fabrics, subtle details, and elegant simplicity. Focus on pieces that transcend trends

. Apply highly detailed clothing with realistic fabric textures, accurate shadows, proper material properties, and natural interaction with the body and environment. Maximum realism in clothing rendering
. Apply clothing with good overall appearance and appropriate styling without excessive detail focus

textFields.label: Specific Outfit Details
textFields.helpText: Optional: Add specific details about the outfit. Examples: 'Navy blue color scheme', 'Include a leather jacket', 'Add floral patterns', 'Use designer brands', 'Include specific accessories like watch or jewelry', 'Specific fabric like silk or denim'

data.description: Generate spritesheets for sideview environment props suitable for 2D games. Creates organized grids of game assets with consistent style, perspective, and scale.
data.promptTemplate: Spritesheet layout with multiple {{prop_type}} arranged in a grid. {{view_angle}}{{art_style}}{{size_variation}}{{color_palette}}{{detail_level}}{{background_style}}

textFields.label: Custom Prop Description
textFields.helpText: Describe specific props you want in the spritesheet. Examples: 'oak trees with varying leaf density', 'wooden crates with different damage states', 'fantasy crystals in blue, red, and green', 'medieval torch sconces with lit and unlit versions'

textFields.label: Additional Style Notes
textFields.helpText: Add specific style requirements or visual characteristics. Examples: 'with thick black outlines', 'weathered and aged appearance', 'glowing magical effects', 'consistent lighting from top-left'

textFields.label: Custom Character Description
textFields.helpText: Detailed description of your character sprite. Include: physical appearance (age, gender, build), equipment specifics (weapon type, armor style), clothing details (colors, materials, design), distinctive features (scars, tattoos, accessories), personality reflected in design. Examples: 'Young female knight, long red hair in ponytail, silver armor with blue gem accents, crystal sword, determined expression' or 'Grizzled veteran soldier, short grey hair, camouflage fatigues, assault rifle, weathered face with scar'
